allow: PowerShell(cd "c:\\Projects\\PersonaOn v2"; $p = Start-Process "cmd.exe" -ArgumentList "/c","npm run dev > dev.log 2>&1" -PassThru -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep -Seconds 14; foreach \($u in @\("/","/onboarding"\)\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest "http://localhost:3000$u" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 20; "$u -> HTTP $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { "$u -> ERR: $_" } }; Get-Process node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)
